name: gcloud-cli-health-check
description: Read-only health check for your Google Cloud CLI (gcloud) setup. Verifies install, auth, active project, billing, enabled APIs, Artifact Registry, Cloud Run services, Secret Manager, and budget — against any GCP account. Fully env-var driven; no hard-coded identifiers. Produces a concise ✅/⚠️/❌ markdown report with action items. Works in Claude Code, Cowork, or any shell MCP-capable runtime.
